page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Manage your editing experience, data storage, and personalization

sync.title: Local settings found
sync.message: You changed settings while logged out, and they differ from your cloud settings.
sync.description: Use cloud settings to overwrite local settings, or keep using the local settings on this device.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.autoSaveDesc: Set how often the editor saves automatically
preferences.themeModeDesc: Switch website color theme; resume exports are unaffected
preferences.exportJsonDesc: Include page settings, fonts, and style information when exporting JSON

localStorage.title: Local Storage
localStorage.desc: Select a folder to store resume data
localStorage.locationDesc: Choose where resume data is saved locally
localStorage.unsupported: This browser does not support local file storage
localStorage.unsupportedShort: Local file storage is not supported
localStorage.emptyHint: Select a folder to store resume JSON files
localStorage.backupHint: Select a local folder for resume data backups
localStorage.backupDescription: After setup, each resume save is also backed up to the local folder, making it easier to migrate and keep your data. Chrome or Edge is recommended.

aiService.title: AI Service
aiService.desc: Configure AI features for resume optimization and suggestions
aiService.publicModelLoginRequired: Log in to use public models
aiService.publicModelLoginHint: Public models require login. Only custom models are available now.
aiService.publicModelDesc: Use shared AI models configured by the admin; no API key required
aiService.customModelDesc: Use your own API key and custom model
aiService.selectPublicModelForService: Select a public model to use AI services
aiService.apiUrlDesc: Supports OpenAI-compatible APIs. You can enter a custom endpoint.
aiService.apiKeyDesc: Enter the provider API key. Leave it blank to call without authentication.
aiService.fetchModelsHelp: If fetching models fails, see the

live2d.desc: Control how the Live2D character appears on the page

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.desc: Adjust click-through, nearby behavior and pin mode

about.title: About
about.desc: Version and related information for this app
about.techStackDesc: Frontend uses React + Tailwind CSS; backend uses Go
about.live2dModelDesc: Powered by live2d-widget with a community-contributed model
